name: Finn Keane
description: '''Finn Keane''', previously known as '''Easyfun''' (stylised in all caps and formerly as '''easyFun'''), is a British songwriter and record producer. He is known for his frequent collaborations with [[Charli XCX]], his releases on experimental pop label [[PC Music]], and his work with the label's founder [[A. G. Cook]] in the duo [[Thy Slaughter]].  His work with Charli XCX has earned him two [[Grammy Awards|Grammy Award]] nominations: [[Grammy Award for Album of the Year|Album of the Year]] for ''[[Brat (album)|Brat]]'' and [[Grammy Award for Best Dance Pop Recording|Best Dance Pop Recording]] for "[[Von Dutch (song)|Von Dutch]]", of which he won the latter.
